_publications._publicationTitle: NF106: A Neurofibromatosis Clinical Trials Consortium Phase II Trial of the MEK Inhibitor Mirdametinib (PD-0325901) in Adolescents and Adults With NF1-Related Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: In the domains (Appendix Table A 4 , online only), only the PR group rated significant physical changes, including improvements in Movement and Balance at courses 8 and 12 or worsening Skin Irritation at course 4.
